scripts.copy-assets: mkdir -p webfonts dist/fonts && cp node_modules/@fortawesome/fontawesome-free/css/all.min.css dist/fa.min.css && cp node_modules/@fortawesome/fontawesome-free/webfonts/* webfonts/ && cp node_modules/devicon/devicon.min.css dist/devicon.min.css && cp node_modules/devicon/fonts/* dist/fonts/
